column1: I will go to the shop ... is next to the police station.
These are the shoes ... I found in the closet.
“Last Christmas” is the song ... she listens all the time.
I visited the museum ... my friend recommended.
They live in Nashville ... is a big city.
I lost the teddy bear ... was on the bed.
He is the photographer ... made that famous picture.
I can see the people ... try to make fire.
My partner is a student ... speaks English well.
He is the champion ... won the Olympic Games.
I’ve just met the woman ... visited me in the hospital.
I said ‘thank you’ to the person ... was nice to me.
